notes: Business, account, campaign, ad set, and creative identifiers are replaced with deterministic aliases per generated artifact.
Creative names, campaign names, ad set names, preview URLs, copy text, tokens, and customer names are not exported.

warnings: Campaign baselines in this artifact are lab-computed only; production campaign segmentation still requires explicit benchmark scope input.
meta_creative_daily is empty in the checked database; current verification is API/payload parity only because the product Creative pipeline uses the creative API/snapshot source.
candidate-01: skipped because the assigned Meta account rejected current API reads with an OAuth checkpoint/token error.
